anchor.value: {\displaystyle C_{H}^{d}(S):=\inf {\Bigl \{}\sum _{i}r_{i}^{d}:{\text{ there is a cover of }}S{\text{ by balls with radii }}r_{i}>0{\Bigr \}}.}

annotations.note: Mathlib formalizes the Hausdorff measure, a closely related but distinct construction; the d-dimensional Hausdorff content itself is not a standalone decl.
